economic_notes: Cowessess Ventures Limited Partnership and Cowessess Ventures Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method. Nation had interests in farming (4C Farms), wind developments (Cowessess Wind Developments), urban developments, and energy development (Awasis Nehiyawewini). Net loss from business entities of $853,669 in 2020 vs earnings of $769,826 in 2019. Last Oak Golf & Country Club and Cowessess Mall consolidated. Treaty Land Entitlement trust and flood claim trust not consolidated.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (March 31, 2020). Province is Saskatchewan, not Alberta. The statement consolidates 9 entities including CMHC Housing Projects, Last Oak Golf & Country Club, Cowessess Mall, Crooked Lake Homes Ltd., Crooked Lake Homes Limited Partnership, Cowessess Development Account, Little Child Community Development Board Inc., and Cowessess Land Holdings Corp. Two GBEs (Cowessess Ventures Limited Partnership and Cowessess Ventures Ltd.) accounted for by modified equity method with a combined loss of $853,669. Several trusts (Treaty Land Entitlement Trust, Flood Claim Trust, Band Development/Culture/Recreation/Education/Agriculture Trust) are excluded from consolidation as they are controlled by external trustees. Restricted cash includes $3,867,880 in project management cash and $445,612 in CMHC reserves. TLE payable of $780,000 being repaid at $10,000/month. Annual debt service reflects repayment of long-term debt only; capital lease repayments of $76,692 also made. COVID-19 referenced in deferred revenue (Social - Special Needs COVID-19 of $23,894).
